title: Hey Vasamoakka Lyrics Vaalu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Anirudh, Andrea Jeremiah,
Song: Hey Vasamoakka
Movie: Vaalu, 
Music: Thaman S, 

Hey Vasamoakka pecho vodka
my hansikka.
Hey aska laska ponne
nee en hookkaa hookkaa .

Hey mambo baambo jumbo rambo
you're my simbu.
hey neeyum naanum rainbow vaanil
lovely combo.

Puravangal rendil, valaindhidum bendil
tholaindhida vendumey vendumey enakku.
Boy friendu vilayaada vendumey enakku

Karuvizhil vandil pudhu pudhu trendil
honey thaeda vendumey enakku.
Petrol-in vilayaai, tsunami alayaai
yeripogudhey kirukku enakku.

Hey mambo baambo jumbo rambo
you're my simbu

When I look into your eyes
you make me feel so nice
every moment so surprise
konjam neruppu konjam eyes
never feeling insecure
with you baby ..
no body no body unnathavira
unnathavira

You n me, you n me
naama iruvarum thaan jodi
you n me, you n me,
always happy, always free

Nerinil udhithaai,
indru foreign-il kuthithaai
vellai moongile oliththaai
ennai ottrai songile kiliththai

Unakkennai ensure seidhu
idhalgalai insure seidhen
unai ullae secure seiyya
nenjam engum panjar paarthaen

agamellaam ... unnaal
ganam pooththaeney
kaalodu seruppaai
saambaaril paruppaai
naanum neeyumthaan irupomey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hey Vasamoakka'?

The song 'Hey Vasamoakka' is a lively duet that expresses playful affection and the joy of being in love.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Vaalu'?

In Vaalu, the song is set during a fun and romantic moment between the lead characters, highlighting their chemistry.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Anirudh, with music composed by Thaman S.

When was 'Hey Vasamoakka' released?

'Hey Vasamoakka' was released on March 7, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Hey Vasamoakka' from the movie Vaalu is a lively and upbeat duet that captures the playful spirit of young love. With its catchy lyrics and vibrant music, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. The chemistry between the singers, Andrea Jeremiah and Anirudh, adds to the song's charm, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song conveys a sense of carefree happiness, inviting listeners to dance along and enjoy the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hey Vasamoakka from Vaalu is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring the dynamic voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Anirudh. This catchy duet, composed by Thaman S, perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Get ready to groove to its infectious beats and playful lyrics that will leave you wanting more!
stanzaMeanings: You're my special one. You are my hook, hook.
You're my fun and lively partner, we make a lovely pair in the sky.
I need to find a way to deal with the troubles that come my way. I need a boyfriend to play with.
I need to find new trends that come my way. The price of petrol is rising, and it's causing a stir in my life.
You're my special one. You are my hook, hook.
You're my fun and lively partner, we make a lovely pair in the sky.
When I look into your eyes, you make me feel good and surprised. A little fire and a little gaze, I never feel insecure with you, baby. No one else can compare to you.
You and I, we are a pair. You and I, always happy and free.
You have come to me, today you have arrived from abroad, shining like a white cloud, making me feel light with your song.
I have ensured your safety and secured my heart for you, I have watched over you everywhere.
I have blossomed with your love, together we will be like rice and lentils in a dish.
You're my special one. You are my hook, hook.
You're my fun and lively partner, we make a lovely pair in the sky.
I need to find a way to deal with the troubles that come my way. I need a boyfriend to play with.
I need to find new trends that come my way. The price of petrol is rising, and it's causing a stir in my life.
